emails.subject: Re: 3/30 Checkout
emails.body: Re: 3/30 Checkout It's been changed to 250 Chris is going to talk to Bloomberg, though, because he thought it was a deal for 247. I'll let you know what they work out. Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 03/30/2001 01:21 PM
